title: Oxydectes scouleri
intro: Oxydectes scouleri, also known as Scouler's clover or Oxydectes, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Oxydectes scouleri include isoflavones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Oxydectes scouleri is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, as well as in supplements, to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
